headline: Entergy (ETR) Launches $2.17B Common Stock Offering
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is one of the 15 Best Power Generation Stocks To Buy For Data Center Demand. On May 5, 2026, Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) announced the launch of a registered underwritten offering of $2.17B in common stock, subsequently priced at $113.00. Wells Fargo Securities, Citigroup, Barclays, and Scotiabank are serving as joint book-running managers. […]
